Package neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion

Class CorrosionInhibitorPerformance

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.chemistry.corrosion.CorrosionInhibitorPerformance
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class CorrosionInhibitorPerformance extends Object implements Serializable
Empirical performance model for film-forming corrosion inhibitors.

Computes the inhibited corrosion rate as: 

 
 CR_inhibited = CR_base * (1 - efficiency)

where CR_base is the uninhibited corrosion rate (e.g. from NORSOK M-506 model) and efficiency is a function of inhibitor chemistry, dose, temperature, shear, and the presence of organic acids / H2S / O2.

The model is calibrated on rotating cylinder electrode (RCE) and high-pressure autoclave data for typical sweet (CO2) and mildly sour service. It is not appropriate for severe sour, very high shear (above 200 Pa), or extreme temperatures (above 175 C) without bench validation.

Pattern: configure with setters, call evaluate(), then read getters or toMap().

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • setChemistry

      public void setChemistry(CorrosionInhibitorPerformance.InhibitorChemistry chemistry)
      Sets the inhibitor chemistry.
      Parameters:
      chemistry - inhibitor family

    • setDoseMgL

      public void setDoseMgL(double doseMgL)
      Sets the inhibitor dose.
      Parameters:
      doseMgL - dose in mg/L of active ingredient

    • setBaseCorrosionRateMmYr

      public void setBaseCorrosionRateMmYr(double mmYr)
      Sets the uninhibited (base) corrosion rate, typically from NORSOK M-506.
      Parameters:
      mmYr - base CR in mm/yr

    • setTemperatureCelsius

      public void setTemperatureCelsius(double temperatureC)
      Sets the operating temperature.
      Parameters:
      temperatureC - temperature in Celsius

    • setWallShearStressPa

      public void setWallShearStressPa(double pa)
      Sets the wall shear stress.
      Parameters:
      pa - shear stress in Pa

    • setOrganicAcidPpm

      public void setOrganicAcidPpm(double ppm)
      Sets the dissolved organic acid (acetic + propionic) concentration.
      Parameters:
      ppm - concentration in ppm (mass)

    • setH2SPartialPressureBar

      public void setH2SPartialPressureBar(double bar)
      Sets the H2S partial pressure.
      Parameters:
      bar - partial pressure in bar

    • setOxygenPpb

      public void setOxygenPpb(double ppb)
      Sets the dissolved oxygen content.
      Parameters:
      ppb - concentration in ppb

    • setAcidicService

      public void setAcidicService(boolean acidicService)
      Flags acidic service (low pH, e.g. during stimulation).
      Parameters:
      acidicService - true for acid service

    • setFromDeWaardMilliams

      public void setFromDeWaardMilliams(DeWaardMilliamsCorrosion baseline)
      Pulls the uninhibited corrosion rate from a physics-based De Waard–Milliams calculator. Calls DeWaardMilliamsCorrosion.calculateBaselineRate() so the calculator does not need to be pre-evaluated.
      Parameters:
      baseline - configured De Waard–Milliams calculator

    • fromStream

      public static CorrosionInhibitorPerformance fromStream(StreamInterface stream, double pipeIdMeters, double velocityMps)
      Convenience factory: builds a CorrosionInhibitorPerformance with operating conditions seeded from a stream and a Pa-level wall shear estimate from the bulk velocity (caller still picks inhibitor chemistry and dose).
      Parameters:
      stream - produced fluid stream
      pipeIdMeters - pipe inside diameter in meters (for wall-shear estimate)
      velocityMps - bulk flow velocity in m/s (for wall-shear estimate)
      Returns:
      configured (but not evaluated) performance model

    • evaluate

      public void evaluate()
      Computes inhibitor efficiency, inhibited corrosion rate, and minimum effective dose.

      private static double maxEfficiency(CorrosionInhibitorPerformance.InhibitorChemistry chem)
      Maximum efficiency obtainable for a given chemistry under benign conditions.
      Parameters:
      chem - inhibitor chemistry
      Returns:
      max efficiency 0..1

      private static double baseMed(CorrosionInhibitorPerformance.InhibitorChemistry chem)

      MED in mg/L

    • temperaturePenalty

      private static double temperaturePenalty(CorrosionInhibitorPerformance.InhibitorChemistry chem, double tC)
      Temperature penalty factor.
      Parameters:
      chem - chemistry
      tC - temperature in Celsius
      Returns:
      penalty 0..1 (1 = no penalty)
